Deprecated List
Member ros::package::getPlugins (const std::string &package, const std::string &attribute, M_string &plugins, bool force_recrawl=false)
Prefer the ::getPlugins(const std::string&, const std::string&, std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::string>>&, bool) api instead.
